nativeProps: React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>, excluding type, value, defaultValue, maxLength, and native onChange

props.name: groups
props.type: readonly number[]; every group is 1 through 12 and the total is 4 through 12

compositionPolicy.native: One real text input owns focus, editing, selection, caret, composition, one-time-code autofill, validation, form submission, and reset. Paste event text is read only to normalize a complete bounded insertion and is never persisted or transmitted.
compositionPolicy.segments: Decorative grouping guides are aria-hidden and never become focus targets or independent fields.
compositionPolicy.normalization: NFKC-normalized ASCII digits, or ASCII letters and digits when explicitly selected, are bounded to the declared group total.
compositionPolicy.completion: Completion is an optional notification for each newly complete value; an unchanged complete value is not announced twice. The component never submits, advances focus, verifies, or treats entry as a cognitive-function test.
compositionPolicy.field: ID, label, description, error, required, and invalid relationships are inherited from Field unless explicitly supplied.
